config.infinity_item_editor_re.title: Infinity Item Editor Re Config
config.infinity_item_editor_re.item_gui_: Use the sidebar item editor layout once that GUI is fully ported.
Choose the item editor layout. Legacy keeps the original UI; Sidebar enables the redesigned UI.
Show the Infinity Void creative tab and enable Void item collection.
config.infinity_item_editor_re.void_add_: Notify the player when newly discovered entries are added to the Void.
config.infinity_item_editor_re.void_tab_: Hide player heads from the Infinity Void creative tab.
config.infinity_item_editor_re.unavailab: Show the creative tab for normally unavailable items.
config.infinity_item_editor_re.banner_ta: Show the helper creative tab with banner and shield items.
Show the helper creative tab with player heads.
config.infinity_item_editor_re.thief_tab: Show the creative tab for thief helper items.
config.infinity_item_editor_re.firework_: Show the helper creative tab with firework items.
screen.infinity_item_editor_re.component: Minecraft components use the controls below; raw input is hidden.
Modded components still use manual raw values. Type the value above, then save.
screen.infinity_item_editor_re.nbtadv.un: This is not finished and will include more features in the future!
screen.infinity_item_editor_re.head: Head Editor
screen.infinity_item_editor_re.item.name: Item Name
screen.infinity_item_editor_re.item.drop: Hold shift to copy /give command to your clipboard
You can then paste it somewhere else
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_n: The item editor GUI has not been ported yet.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_r: Applying to inventory requires creative mode.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_i: Count must be an integer from 1 to %s.
Meta must be an integer from 0 to %s.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_j: JSON has unapplied changes. Press Back again to discard.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_c: Command cleared in the editor. Apply to save.
Command block settings have unapplied changes. Press Back again to discard.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_i: Enchantment level must be an integer from 1 to %s.
Potion amplifier must be an integer from 1 to %s.
Potion time must be an integer from 1 to %s seconds.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_a: Applied %s to the target inventory slot.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_i: Cannot write to the target slot.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_c: Double-click the mod name to expand or collapse its components.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_i: Attribute value must be a valid number.
Color must be a 6-digit hex value.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_b: Converted the written book to a writable book.
Converted the writable book to a written book.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_c: Slot item NBT must describe a valid item stack.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_t: Trade item NBT must describe a valid item stack.
%s must be an integer from %s to %s.
%s must be a non-negative decimal number.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.editor_s: No spawn egg item exists for %s.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.copy_no_: Look at a block, player, mob, or armor stand to copy it.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.copy_req: Copying to inventory requires creative mode.
message.infinity_item_editor_re.copy_emp: That block did not provide an item stack.
